name: Decorative Wall Shelf - Cloud Island™ Moon Shelf
description: You'll love the unique and functional design that this Decorative Moon Wall Shelf from cloud island™ brings to your nursery. It features a circular design that has two shelves on the inside, along with having a sweet crescent moon accent on the front of one side for charming touch. With a gray and white color scheme that pairs with a variety of nursery styles, this round nursery wall shelf is perfect for displaying decor or keeping pacifiers, age blocks and any other little accessories you need close at hand.
